sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67092" key="mete/leusis" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μετ-έλευσις</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">εως</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n67092.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">sequence, succession</tr_>, <cit TEIform="cit"> <quote_ lang="greek" TEIform="quote">χρόνων</quote_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg1764.tlg001:219:11" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Vett.Val.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">219.11</biblScope></bibl></cit>. </sense> <sense n="II" id="n67092.1" level="2" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> Medic., <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">change of treatment</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:2:15" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Sor.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">2.15</biblScope></bibl>,<bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0565.tlg001:29" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">29</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
